item.name: Seller Step 2: Provide personal + business details. Bank info is collected separately via POST /sellers/me/banking after login - do not send it here.

request.description: Seller Step 2: Provide personal + business details. Bank info is collected separately via POST /sellers/me/banking after login - do not send it here.

body.raw:
{
  "sessionId": "session-uuid-here",
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Doe",
  "dateOfBirth": "1990-01-15",
  "phoneNumber": "+2348012345678",
  "businessName": "Steppers Store NG",
  "businessRegistrationNumber": "RC-1234567",
  "businessAddress": "Shop 15, Balogun Market, Lagos Island",
  "businessType": "sole_proprietor",
  "termsAccepted": true
}

  "businessAddress": "Shop 15, Balogun Market, Lagos Island",

}

response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "statusCode": 200,
  "data": {
    "id": "6710abc123def456789012ab",
    "firstName": "Jane",
    "lastName": "Doe",
    "email": "jane@example.com",
    "accountType": "BUYER",
    "phoneNumber": "+2348012345678",
    "dateOfBirth": "1990-01-15T00:00:00.000Z",
    "isEmailVerified": true,
    "isVerified": true,
    "isTwoFactorEnabled": false,
    "marketingConsent": false,
    "marketingConsentAt": null,
    "createdAt": "2026-05-19T10:23:00.000Z",
    "fullName": "Jane Doe"
  },
  "message": "Request successful",
  "meta": {
    "correlationId": "req-00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000",
    "timestamp": "2025-01-15T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
